visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a grey off-the-shoulder top, stands in a brightly lit warehouse store. She is examining several large green plants with split leaves housed in white textured pots on a metal shelf. Behind her are stacked boxes and distant store elements. (2) The camera zooms in on a price tag indicating $569 and plant details. The woman points to the leaves and gestures towards the camera while speaking. A young child in a purple shirt is visible sitting on a lower shelf in the background. (3) The scene focuses on the large, glossy green leaves as the woman touches them. She continues talking, gesturing with her hands to show leaf size. The lighting is bright and industrial. Finally, she looks directly at the camera and gives a thumbs up.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 誇張便宜. [Variety]: 超美龜背芋盆栽. [Subtitle]: 我們請. (2) [Subtitle]: 我們森林系女孩. [Subtitle]: 來幫我們介紹龜背葉. (3) [Subtitle]: 我跟龜背葉又不熟. (4) [Subtitle]: 哈哈哈哈沒關係. (5) [Subtitle]: 你還是可以介紹一下. [Subtitle]: 因為它只要569元. (6) [Subtitle]: 它就是很漂亮拍照很好看. [Subtitle]: 然後也蠻好養. [Subtitle]: 我只知道它很怕冷. [Subtitle]: 就是它寒流的時候. [Subtitle]: 你不可以把它放室外. [Subtitle]: 你要把它放到室內. (7) [Subtitle]: 可是我叫它龜背葉. [Subtitle]: 你都沒有阻止我. [Variety]: 龜背葉！ [Variety]: 它叫龜背芋. [Variety]: ???. (8) [Subtitle]: 然後它呢是八吋的高. [Subtitle]: 所以每個是60-80公分. [Subtitle]: 放在家裡其實蠻好看的. [Subtitle]: 最重要它這價格是很划算. [Subtitle]: 因為它們的葉面呢. [Subtitle]: 都好大片哦. [Subtitle]: 好漂亮哦. [Subtitle]: 很漂亮而且現場. [Subtitle]: 你還可以直接挑. [Subtitle]: 而且它的盒子. [Subtitle]: 也都是漂亮的. [Subtitle]: 因為有時候外面花盆. [Subtitle]: 也是貴的. [Subtitle]: 好市多很誠意. [Subtitle]: 它都有附一些很漂亮的花盆. (9) [Subtitle]: 嗯. [Subtitle]: 然後龜背芋好看. [Subtitle]: 就是你要定期. [Subtitle]: 去擦它的葉面. [Subtitle]: 它就會很亮. [Subtitle]: 很漂亮亮. [Subtitle]: 後我覺得它有一個優點是. [Subtitle]: 因為它的肥料啊. [Subtitle]: 是一季換一次就可以了. [Subtitle]: 所以相對簡單一些. [Subtitle]: 推薦給你.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 child sitting in the background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a grey off-the-shoulder top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An industrial warehouse store setting with high shelves, stacked boxes, and a nursery section featuring potted Monstera plants.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Cheerful, up-tempo electronic pop music starts with a driving beat. A male voice with a friendly tone introduces the scene, followed by a female voice laughing and engaging in playful dialogue. Background warehouse room tone is minimal. (2) A bright 'ding' sound effect triggers as the female voice begins explaining the plant features with high vocal energy and clarity. The BGM remains consistent in the background. (3) A comedic 'boing' cartoon sound effect plays as the male voice corrects the speaker's terminology. The female voice continues with a rising intonation, describing the leaf size and pot quality. (4) The female voice provides specific care tips with moderate speech density. The interplay between the rhythmic music and the enthusiastic speech creates a lively production atmosphere. The track concludes with a final recommendation and a quick fade.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Evidence -> Maintenance Tips -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a specific Monstera plant deal at Costco, emphasizing its aesthetic value and low price while providing basic care tips to potential buyers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcase of a product within a specific retailer (Costco) with price emphasis and recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A social-native product review vlog utilizing standard warehouse-style filming with variety-show text overlays and sound effects.
